chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. S – 1036 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.8923/23 & 8978/24 2.For order on CMA No.917/24 3.For hearing of CMA No.7522/23 4.For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 None present for petitioner ---------- This is fourth date of hearing, when none appeared for petitioner. No intimation is received. Even though notices were sent to counsel for petitioner. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in this matter. Dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
